name: Riya Sharma
review: Love my personalised bae bag!

name: Ananya Kapoor
review: The vegan leather feels so premium. Got the caramel crush and it's gorgeous!

name: Mehak Arora
review: The personalisation was done so neatly. My name looks beautiful on the bag. Quality feels premium and the colour is exactly as shown.

name: Pooja Mehta
review: I ordered the Bae Bag as a birthday gift for my best friend and she absolutely loved it! The packaging was so elegant and the bag itself felt incredibly premium. The vegan leather is soft yet durable, and the personalised name embossing looked stunning. Will definitely order again for my next gifting occasion!

name: Simran Dhillon
review: Cherry rouge shade is everything!

name: Neha Verma
review: Super cute makeup bag. Holds all my essentials and the zipper is smooth and sturdy.

name: Kritika Jain
review: Bought the travel kit and it's so well designed. Everything fits perfectly and the satin lining inside keeps things scratch free. Love it!

name: Ishita Singh
review: I have been looking for a good quality personalised pouch for ages and The Bae Shop delivered exactly what I wanted. The vintage gold colour is stunning, the leather feels premium and cruelty-free which is important to me. The personalised embossing arrived within 48 hours and it looks so classy. 100% recommend!

name: Ayesha Khan
review: Quick delivery, great bag.

name: Tanvi Desai
review: The earring pouch is compact and so well made. All my earrings stay tangle-free. Ordered 2 more as gifts!

name: Sneha Gupta
review: The gift wrapping was so beautiful. Felt like a luxury unboxing experience!

name: Radhika Iyer
review: Gifted the Bae Bag to my sister on her anniversary and she cried happy tears! The personalised name tag, the elegant box, the stunning caramel crush colour — everything was perfect. The vegan leather feels so soft and looks so premium. This is now my go-to gift brand for every occasion.

name: Priya Nair
review: Best gift I've ever given!

name: Shreya Bose
review: The passport holder is so sleek and practical. Fits all my cards and documents. Looks great too!

name: Divya Reddy
review: Exactly as described. The vegan leather doesn't look cheap at all, it's very classy.

name: Nikita Patil
review: I have ordered from The Bae Shop twice now and each time the quality has been consistent and impressive. My first order was the gold rush makeup bag and the second was the cherry rouge travel kit. Both arrived beautifully packed, the PU leather is scratch resistant and water resistant which is so practical. The personalised embossing makes it feel truly special.

name: Payal Agarwal
review: Gold rush colour is so chic.

name: Mansi Shah
review: Placed a bulk order for corporate gifting and the team was so helpful. Each bag was personalised with employee names and they delivered on time. Everyone loved them!

name: Komal Arora
review: The microfibre interior is so soft and keeps everything protected. Perfect bag!

name: Tanya Bhatia
review: My personalised bae bag arrived in 3 days and the quality exceeded my expectations. The vegan leather has a beautiful texture and the name embossing is so precise. I've been using it as my everyday bag and it still looks brand new after a month. The magnetic gift box it came in was also super premium. Highly recommend The Bae Shop!

name: Aarti Singh
review: Love the quality and colour!

name: Pallavi Mishra
review: The zipper hardware is so sturdy and smooth. Feels like a high-end brand.

name: Sonal Choudhary
review: The vintage gold shade looks absolutely premium in real life. The personalised embossing is done beautifully. Very happy with my purchase!

name: Ritu Saxena
review: Ordered the earring pouch and the makeup bag as a combo gift. Both were beautifully packaged and the quality is excellent. The earring pouch keeps all my jewellery organised perfectly. Only feedback is I wish there were more colour options, but the ones available are all beautiful. Would definitely order again!

name: Nisha Yadav
review: So cute and personalised!

name: Bhavna Joshi
review: Good packaging, premium feel. The caramel crush is my favourite shade.

name: Swati Kulkarni
review: Perfect for travel! The travel kit organiser is so well thought out. Everything has its own compartment and it fits neatly in my suitcase.

name: Heena Shaikh
review: I discovered The Bae Shop through Instagram and I'm so glad I placed an order. The Bae Bag in cherry rouge is absolutely stunning. The vegan leather quality is so good that my friends couldn't believe it's not real leather. It's cruelty-free, personalised, and delivered beautifully. This is the perfect blend of style and ethics. Already bought 3 more as gifts!

name: Garima Khanna
review: Perfect personalised gift!

name: Sakshi Verma
review: The personalised name tag is such a thoughtful touch. Came faster than expected and the bag quality is excellent. Great value!
